hooks.command: if [ -f ~/Library/Logs/DraftCanvas/canvas.log ]; then echo '=== DraftCanvas CanvasMetrics ===' && grep 'CanvasMetrics' ~/Library/Logs/DraftCanvas/canvas.log | tail -20; echo '=== Recent App Events (non-JSONRPC) ===' && grep -v '-> {\|<- {\|-> {\|method\|result' ~/Library/Logs/DraftCanvas/canvas.log | tail -10; fi
